title: The night the oven finally got hot
dek: Three hours, one fire, seven pizzas — and a temperature trace that tells the whole story.
fault_caption: A one-sample sensor glitch: an open thermocouple pins the MAX6675 at the top of its range (1,874°F). Not a real hearth temperature — just the wire briefly losing contact.

pizza_blurbs.1: The opener — snap peas, prosciutto, arugula. Named after the chef himself.
pizza_blurbs.12: The crowd favorite: pesto, parm, olives, onion, artichoke hearts, salami, arugula after the bake.
